items.name: button
items.title: Button
items.description: A Y2K flat button with thick navy outline and pastel fill.

items.name: dialog
items.title: Dialog
items.description: A Y2K modal with a [_ ▢ ✕] window-chrome title bar. Each control is hideable via prop.

items.name: input
items.title: Input
items.description: A Y2K text input with thick navy outline and pastel focus ring.

items.name: card
items.title: Card
items.description: A Y2K flat panel with thick navy border, optional title bar, and content slots.

items.name: badge
items.title: Badge
items.description: A Y2K pastel badge with thick outline. Six color variants.

items.name: tooltip
items.title: Tooltip
items.description: A Y2K flat tooltip with thick navy border, perfect for hints.

items.name: switch
items.title: Switch
items.description: A Y2K toggle switch — pastel track + lemon thumb with thick navy border.

items.name: tabs
items.title: Tabs
items.description: Y2K file-tab style tabs — pastel active state, thick navy borders.

items.name: alert
items.title: Alert
items.description: A Y2K banner for info, warning, and danger messages. Six pastel variants.

items.name: checkbox
items.title: Checkbox
items.description: A Y2K checkbox with thick navy border and lemon fill when checked.

items.name: avatar
items.title: Avatar
items.description: A Y2K retro-square avatar with thick navy border. Image + fallback slots.

items.name: progress
items.title: Progress
items.description: A Y2K progress bar with thick navy border and pastel blue fill.

items.name: select
items.title: Select
items.description: A Y2K dropdown select with thick navy border and lemon highlight on focus.

items.name: accordion
items.title: Accordion
items.description: A Y2K collapsible accordion with pastel headers, thick navy outlines, and Radix accessibility.

items.name: radio-group
items.title: Radio Group
items.description: A Y2K radio group with square retro dots, pastel checked fills, and Radix keyboard navigation.

items.name: slider
items.title: Slider
items.description: A Y2K range slider with thick navy track border, pastel range fill, and lemon thumb.

items.name: textarea
items.title: Textarea
items.description: A Y2K multiline input with thick navy outline, pastel fill variants, and pink focus ring.

items.name: separator
items.title: Separator
items.description: A simple Y2K divider with thick flat lines, pastel color variants, and Radix orientation support.

items.name: chart
items.title: Charts
items.description: Y2K-styled interactive bar, line, and donut charts powered by Recharts with thick outlines and pastel fills.

items.name: skeleton
items.title: Skeleton
items.description: Y2K loading skeleton with thick outlines and pastel pulse animation.

items.name: table
items.title: Table
items.description: Y2K data table with thick navy borders, pastel header, and lemon hover states.

items.name: breadcrumb
items.title: Breadcrumb
items.description: Y2K breadcrumb navigation with thick outlines and chevron separators.

items.name: toggle
items.title: Toggle
items.description: Y2K toggle button with thick outline, shadow press effect, and group support.
